title: Data Management Specialist (SQL, Python)
description:
ASTEK has been providing IT and Engineering solutions for some of the world’s largest industrial and services groups for more than 35 years with 10,000 passionate experts in 22 countries throughout Europe, APAC, Middle East and the Americas

Currently, we are looking for Data Management Specialist which would be based in Singapore

Responsibilities and requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in computer science/information technology or related fields
  • Good problem-solving skills with ability to provide sound, feasible solution to problems
  • Proactively identify area of improvement in processes
  • Ability to bridge technical terminologies and business use cases
  • Ability to understand technology landscape, SDLC, IT processes and standards to successfully translate problems (both data and technical) to product requirements
  • Ability to conduct thorough analysis, fact findings and design processes and complement with requirements for automation to reduce any manual work
  • Analyze and understand the trade-offs inherent in differing scenarios of a solution outcome
  • Ability to clearly communicate analysis in solution proposals and recommendations
  • Ability to breakdown problem to execution step-by-step, leverage on AI and prompt engineering
  • Skills: proficient in Python, SQL, and Prompt Engineering

postedCompany.description:
Astek has been providing IT and engineering solutions for some of the world’s largest industrial and services groups for over 25 years.
We support our clients with the creation and development of their new products in four main areas of  expertise:

- Information technology and systems (IT & IS);
- Industrial engineering and product development;
- Internet of Things (IoT);
- Digital, web and mobile solutions.

Our Group is operating for 30 years and Astek is a community of 2,500 passionate experts who empower our clients in over 14 countries throughout Europe, APAC, the Middle East and the Americas.

Some of our clients include BNP Paribas, CA-CIB, Societe Generale, Amadeus, Air France, Alstom, Airbus, Thales, Safran, Faurecia, Valeo, Renault, Jaguar, PSA, BMW, Daimler, Schneider Electric, Areva, ENGIE, Veolia, Total…

Our team is dedicated to offering our global clients project support while guaranteeing a consistent level of service alongside a commitment to excellence and strong core values.

We’re always looking for smart, talented, driven, down-to-earth, fun-to-work-with people who want to make a positive and meaningful impact.

To join our community!
www.asteksingapore.com
postedCompany.name: ASTEK SINGAPORE INNOVATION TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.
